summary: Initialized context-graphs research topic. Ran 7 broad web searches covering: (1) state of the art overview 2025-2026, (2) KG-RAG and lab research, (3) Microsoft GraphRAG architecture, (4) lab-specific signals (Google/Anthropic/OpenAI), (5) key arXiv papers on graph-based agent planning and reasoning, (6) Foundation Capital trillion-dollar thesis, (7) production context engineering techniques. Compiled comprehensive notes.md.
outcome: Strong initial landscape map. Key finding: context graphs = decision traces, not just data. GraphRAG + hybrid retrieval + graph-based planning is dominant technical direction. Context engineering (write/select/compress/isolate) is the emerging discipline.
follow_up: Deep dive arXiv papers GAP/GLM/Graphs-Meet-AI-Agents; research startup landscape; MCP+context graph integration; failure modes
